messages.text: about that home, that scrunchie just signed a lease on my side
imaginary but still paying rent in your study session
spiritually im arguing over who gets the lamp
crazy, it looks like it remembers my playlists
both, arguing custody of that desk and you seem stubborn
i always win arguments, keep up
